title: CVE-2000-0259 — CVSS 7.2 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2000-0259

CVSS Score: 7.2 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2000-04-12T04:00:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

The default permissions for the Cryptography\Offload registry key used by the OffloadModExpo in Windows NT 4.0 allows local users to obtain compromise the cryptographic keys of other users.

References: http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/1105, https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/security-updates/securitybulletins/2000/ms00-024, http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/1105
